use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons on landing pages or marketing sites
Interactive form submission buttons with visual feedback
Navigation action triggers with animated hover states
Feature discovery buttons with eye-catching gradient effects
Marketing and promotional UI elements requiring attention
ai_summary: A colorful gradient button component featuring animated background effects with cyan, blue, and purple color transitions. The button includes hover state animations where the gradient opacity increases and blur effects create a glowing appearance, making it ideal for call-to-action elements in modern web applications.
